info.title: Control Service
info.description:
Control Service

 **Last update**: 10 dic 25, 02:28 p. m.

tags.name: Webhooks
tags.description:
This section documents the webhook events triggered by control.

To learn more about Webhooks configuration, see the [Webhooks Documentation](https://docs.janis.im/docs/webhook)

post.description:
This creates the Control registry and start the process like complete data, and check content.

**DISCLAIMER** At the moment, any entity is going to be processed, only creates the registries.
Perform the last validations to finalize the control

requestBody.description: The content to validate the control

post.description:
Determines the start of a control.

The returned token must be used at the [end of the control](#operation/controlEnd).

get.description: Get a Control Rule by ID

put.description: Update a Control Rule by ID

value.description: The order must have a total amount greater than or equal to 10000

entity.description:
This represent the entity to be controlled.

- [**order**](/v2/service/oms#tag/Orders)

x-janis-total.description: The total amount of records in the list

id.description: The unique identifier of the item

dateModified.description: The date of the last modification

userCreated.description: The ID of the user who created the item

userModified.description: The ID of the user who last modified the item

entity.description:
This represent the entity to be controlled.

- [**order**](/v2/service/oms#tag/Orders)

entityReferenceId.description: The entity alternative ID, for `order` is `commerceId`

packageCount.description: The quantity of the packages in the content

warehouseId.description: This represent the `id` from the [Warehouse](/v2/service/wms#tag/Warehouses) where the control take place

warehouseName.description: This represent the `name` from the [Warehouse](/v2/service/wms#tag/Warehouses) where the control take place

status.description:
The control auditory status.

- **processingContent**: When the control is created and his content is being processed
- **pending**: The control has been processed and is pending to begin
- **inProgress**: The control is in progress
- **processingResults**: When the control is processing the results
- **pendingToFix**: When the control finish to process the results but there are content that needs to be fixed
- **finished**: The control is finished and the results are the expected
- **error**: When the control cannot be completed or processed

orderId.description: This refers to the `id` of the **Order** in Janis OMS Service. See [Order](v2/service/oms#tag/Order)

id.description: A unique identifier for the current picking result item. This will be always autogenerated based on the purchased item id.

isSubstitute.description: Indicates if the picked item is a substitute for the original order item

isCandidate.description: Indicates if an item is a candidate for the customer's final choice

eanCount.description: The amount of items with the same EAN that were picked

quantityPerEan.description: The quantity of the current picked item for each picked EAN (the measurement unit of this field is the one in `measurementUnit`)

totalQuantity.description: The total amount quantity of the current picked item (the measurement unit of this field is the one in `measurementUnit`)

pickerId.description: The ID of the picker that performed the picking process

price.description: The price of each quantity of `sellingMeasurementUnit`s of the picked item. If this is not sent, will be autocompleted from Pricing prices.

refId.description: The picked product reference ID. If this is not sent, will be autocompleted from Catalog products.

sellingMeasurementUnit.description: The item **Measurement Unit** that is used for selling the product. If this is not sent, will be autocompleted from Catalog products.

sellingUnitMultiplier.description: The item **Unit Multiplier** that is used for selling the product. If this is not sent, will be autocompleted from Catalog products.

measurementUnit.description: The item **Measurement Unit** of the product. This will be used for invoice process later. If this is not sent, will be autocompleted from Catalog products.

unitMultiplier.description: The item **Unit Multiplier** of the product. This will be used for invoice process later. If this is not sent, will be autocompleted from Catalog products.

imageUrl.description: The item image URL. If this is not sent, will be autocompleted from Catalog products.

id.description: The **Product Groups** `id` in Janis Catalog Service

name.description: The **Product Groups** `name` in Janis Catalog Service

referenceId.description: The **Product Groups** `referenceId` in Janis Catalog Service

icon.description: The **Product Groups** `icon` in Janis Catalog Service

time.description: The time in seconds spent in the picking process of this item

locations.description: A list of locations related to the picked item

items.description: The location related to the picked item

warehouseId.description: This refers to the `id` of an **Warehouse**. See [Warehouse](/v2/service/wms#operation/getWarehouse)

quantity.description: Item quantity of the related location

packageId.description: The ID of the package where it belongs

expectedQuantity.description: The expected quantity to be picked

foundQuantity.description: The found quantity to be picked

missingQuantity.description: The missing quantity to be picked

additionalQuantity.description: The additional quantity to be picked

ControlItemResultByPackage.description:
The results by Packages.

An object with the `packageId` as keys.

ean.description:
Package identification code.

It is required if `packageTypeId` is not passed.

packageTypeId.description:
This refers to the `id` of an **Package Type**. See [Package Type](/v2/service/packing#operation/listPackageType)

It is required if `ean` is not passed.

referenceId.description: This refers to the `referenceId` of the **Package**.

warehouseId.description:
This refers to the `id` in the **Warehouse** Entity. See [Warehouse](/v2/service/wms#tag/Warehouse).

It is required in location.

orderItems.description: A list of order items picked and assigned to the package.

expected.description: The expected quantity to be picked

found.description: The found quantity to be picked

missing.description: The missing quantity to be picked

additional.description: The additional quantity to be picked

PackageItemsControlResult.description: The Package Items results of the Control

expected.description: The expected quantity of items to be found in packages

found.description: The found quantity of items in packages

missing.description: The missing quantity of items in packages

additional.description: The quantity of items that does not belong to any package but were found in packages

wrong.description: The quantity of items that belongs to a package but were found in a different package (misplaced)

ControlResults.description: The results when the Control is finished

ControlIsAdditional.description: Indicate if the content is not expected.

ControlNeedsFix.description: Indicate if the content needs to be fixed. The found quantity is higher or lower than the expected one.

ControlFixed.description: Indicate if the content was fixed. The found quantity were higher or lower than the expected one but now it is correct.

ControlToUpdate.description: A Control registry to be updated

OrderEndControl.description: The content to validate a Control of an Order

OrderContentToValidate.description: The content to validate for a Control's Order type

controlResult.description: The results of the Control. `foundQuantity` represents the `eanCount` (or how many times the same `ean` is repeated)

description.description: A human readable description of the rule
description.example: The order must have a total amount greater than or equal to 100

validators.description: The validators to be applied to the entity

items.description: A validator to be applied to the entity

OrderRuleValidatorNumberValue.title: Number value
OrderRuleValidatorNumberValue.description:
A value to check against.

**It's required for validators:**
  - `totalAmountGreaterThanOrEqual`

items.description:
A list of `id` for [**Category**](/v2/service/catalog#tag/Category) in **Janis Catalog Service** to check against.

**It's required for validator:**
- `itemHasCategory`

A list of `id` for [**Warehouse**](/v2/service/wms#tag/Warehouse) in **Janis WMS Service** to check against.

**It's required for validator:**
- `itemHasPickingWarehouse`

A list of `id` for [**Cluster**](/v2/service/crm#tag/Cluster) in **Janis CRM Service** to check against.

**It's required for validator:**
- `customerHasCluster`

A list of `id` for [**Payment Method**](/v2/service/jef#tag/Payment-Method) in **Janis JEF Service** to check against.

**It's required for validator:**
- `hasPaymentMethod`

OMSOrderHookNotification.description: A notification for an Order Hook from Janis OMS

token.description: A token to notify when task succeeds or fails

allowControl.description: This setting allows to control the orders

orderControlCheckpoint.description: This setting indicates the control check point

ControlWebhookService.description: The service that sends the message

ControlWebhookEntity.description: The entity related to the event

entity.description: This represent the entity to be controlled. See [Control](/v2/service/control#operation/getControl)

entityReferenceId.description: The entity alternative ID, for `order` is `commerceId`. See [Control](/v2/service/control#operation/getControl)

warehouseId.description: This represent the `id` from the [Warehouse](/v2/service/wms#tag/Warehouses) where the control take place

warehouseName.description: This represent the `name` from the [Warehouse](/v2/service/wms#tag/Warehouses) where the control take place
